Name: FDebugTextInfo

Variables.Name: TimeRemaining
Variables.Description: Time remaining for the debug text, -1.f == infinite

Variables.Name: Duration
Variables.Description: Duration used to lerp desired offset

Variables.Name: bAbsoluteLocation
Variables.Description: whether the offset should be treated as absolute world location of the string

Variables.Name: bKeepAttachedToActor
Variables.Description: If the actor moves does the text also move with it?

Variables.Name: bDrawShadow
Variables.Description: Whether to draw a shadow for the text

Variables.Name: OrigActorLocation
Variables.Description: When we first spawn store off the original actor location for use with bKeepAttachedToActor

Variables.Name: Font
Variables.Description: The Font which to display this as.  Will Default to GetSmallFont()

Variables.Name: FontScale
Variables.Description: Scale to apply to font when rendering
